question: Right now, how much energy do you actually have for this path?
hint: Not how much you wish you had. How much is actually here.

question: If you had to name the strongest pull in your mind lately, which would it be?
hint: Tap the one closest to the truth. You can name the others separately.

options.label: Sensual desire
options.desc: The pull of pleasure — food, screens, attention, comfort.

options.label: Ill will
options.desc: Irritation, resentment, quiet judgment, the silent "no".

options.label: Sloth & torpor
options.desc: Heaviness, dullness, the mind closing rather than opening.

options.label: Restlessness
options.desc: The inability to settle. The next tab. The need to move.

options.label: Doubt
options.desc: Is this even working? Am I doing it right? What's the point?

question: How strong is the pull of sensual desire in your days right now?
hint: Food, screens, attention-seeking, restless consumption. Not moral — just honest.

question: How much ill will — irritation, resentment, silent judgment — is moving in you?
How restless is your mind when you try to be still?
How much doubt do you carry about this path?
hint: Doubt is not the enemy — it's information. Name it honestly.

question: How clear is your sense of why you are doing this at all?
How much meditation experience do you have?
hint: This tells your teacher whether to start from the beginning.

options.label: Never sat
options.desc: I've never really meditated. I need the basics.

options.label: A little
options.desc: I've tried apps or occasional sits. Not consistent.

options.label: Regular practice
options.desc: I sit most days. I know the basics.

options.label: Long practice
options.desc: Years of practice. Retreats. Established routine.
